items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding rate limiting on public pages. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete results or traces that confirm the scenario's behavior or failure report. The linked use case and prior steps do not provide sufficient context or data to assess whether the expected result has been met, leading to an inconclusive status.
